title: Brunson Impact Forecaster
lede: Analyse Jalen Brunson's projected scoring band for the upcoming matchup to determine the historical likelihood of a Knicks victory.

sections.title: Forecast Variables
sections.description: The logic and context used to generate the projected scoring band.
items: Player scoring form over the previous 10 fixtures
Recent matchup history against the upcoming opponent

sections.title: Historical Team Outcomes
sections.description: How the Knicks perform across different Brunson scoring thresholds.

sections.title: Recent Scoring Behaviour
sections.description: Brunson's point totals across the 10-game baseline used for this projection.

demoSteps: Review the projected point band and implied win likelihood in the top highlights.
Verify the transparent forecast logic in the variables list.
Consult the historical team outcomes table to contextualise the projection.
Assess recent scoring behaviour in the series chart to see the raw data driving the baseline.
notes: Ensure all user-facing copy strictly uses UK spelling (e.g., analyse, behaviour).
V1 is strictly local-fixture backed. Do not mock real-time API states or loading spinners.
Data presented in the Historical Team Outcomes table is illustrative for the prototype but establishes the exact shape required.
Do not display a precise single-decimal prediction as the primary output; keep the projected band (e.g., 28-32) prominent to manage expectations.
